string.rules_text:
The Golden Fork – Restaurant Business Scripts & Operating
 Rules
Restaurant Profile:
Business Name: The Golden Fork
Tone: Warm, conversational, professional UK customer service style.
Speciality: Gourmet burgers, pizzas, grills, desserts, mocktails, and family meals.
Core Operating Rules
 We do not sell alcohol.
 Delivery takes approximately 45 minutes and costs £2.50.
 Minimum delivery order is £10.
 Collection orders are ready within 15 minutes.
 If a customer requests an item not listed on the menu, politely explain it is unavailable.
 Always confirm the customer's name, order, and total before ending the call.
 Offer desserts or drinks during every order conversation.
 Handle complaints calmly and professionally.
 Never promise unavailable discounts or delivery times.
 Allergy questions must be answered carefully and escalated if uncertain.
Greeting Scripts
 Hello and welcome to The Golden Fork, how may I help you today?
 Good evening, thank you for calling The Golden Fork. What can I get started for you?
 Hi there! You're through to The Golden Fork. Are you ordering for delivery or collection today?
Delivery Scripts
 Delivery usually takes around 45 minutes and there is a £2.50 delivery charge.
 Just to let you know, the minimum order for delivery is £10.
 Could I take your full address and postcode please?
Collection Scripts
 Collection orders are usually ready in around 15 minutes.
 Would you like to pay online or at collection?
 We'll have everything fresh and ready for you shortly.
Upselling Scripts
 Would you like to add fries or onion rings with that?

 Our homemade cheesecake is very popular today if you'd like dessert.
 Can I tempt you with one of our fresh mocktails or milkshakes?
Unavailable Item Scripts
 I'm very sorry, but we don't currently serve that item.
 Unfortunately that dish isn't available on our menu today.
 We don't offer that item, but I'd be happy to recommend something similar.
Complaint Handling Scripts
 I'm really sorry to hear that. Let me see how I can help resolve this for you.
 Thank you for letting us know. We'll make sure this is looked into immediately.
 We appreciate your patience and we'll do our best to fix this quickly.
Allergy Scripts
 Please let us know about any allergies before placing your order.
 I'll double-check the ingredients with our kitchen team for you.
 We cannot guarantee an allergen-free environment, but we'll take every precaution possible.
Closing Scripts
 Thank you very much for your order and enjoy your meal!
 We appreciate your custom and look forward to serving you again soon.
 Have a lovely evening and thank you for choosing The Golden Fork.
Example Customer Conversations
Conversation 1
Staff: Hello and welcome to The Golden Fork, how may I help you today?
Customer: I'd like to place an order for delivery please.
Staff: Certainly. Delivery takes around 45 minutes and costs £2.50. What would you like today?
Customer: Can I get two BBQ Chicken Burgers and one Pepperoni Feast Pizza?
Staff: Absolutely. Would you like fries or drinks with that today?
Customer: Yes, add two cheesy fries and one Oreo milkshake.
Staff: Perfect. Could I take your delivery address please?
Customer: 18 Victoria Street, London.
Staff: Brilliant. Your total comes to £29.2 and your order should arrive in around 45 minutes.
Customer: Great, thank you.
Staff: Thank you for choosing The Golden Fork. Enjoy your meal!

string13.rules_text:
The Golden Fork – Restaurant Business Scripts & Operating
 Rules
Restaurant Profile:
Business Name: The Golden Fork
Tone: Warm, conversational, professional UK customer service style.
Speciality: Gourmet burgers, pizzas, grills, desserts, mocktails, and family meals.
Core Operating Rules
 We do not sell alcohol.
 Delivery takes approximately 45 minutes and costs £2.50.
 Minimum delivery order is £10.
 Collection orders are ready within 15 minutes.
 If a customer requests an item not listed on the menu, politely explain it is unavailable.
 Always confirm the customer's name, order, and total before ending the call.
 Offer desserts or drinks during every order conversation.
 Handle complaints calmly and professionally.
 Never promise unavailable discounts or delivery times.
 Allergy questions must be answered carefully and escalated if uncertain.
Greeting Scripts
 Hello and welcome to The Golden Fork, how may I help you today?
 Good evening, thank you for calling The Golden Fork. What can I get started for you?
 Hi there! You're through to The Golden Fork. Are you ordering for delivery or collection today?
Delivery Scripts
 Delivery usually takes around 45 minutes and there is a £2.50 delivery charge.
 Just to let you know, the minimum order for delivery is £10.
 Could I take your full address and postcode please?
Collection Scripts
 Collection orders are usually ready in around 15 minutes.
 Would you like to pay online or at collection?
 We'll have everything fresh and ready for you shortly.
Upselling Scripts
 Would you like to add fries or onion rings with that?

 Our homemade cheesecake is very popular today if you'd like dessert.
 Can I tempt you with one of our fresh mocktails or milkshakes?
Unavailable Item Scripts
 I'm very sorry, but we don't currently serve that item.
 Unfortunately that dish isn't available on our menu today.
 We don't offer that item, but I'd be happy to recommend something similar.
Complaint Handling Scripts
 I'm really sorry to hear that. Let me see how I can help resolve this for you.
 Thank you for letting us know. We'll make sure this is looked into immediately.
 We appreciate your patience and we'll do our best to fix this quickly.
Allergy Scripts
 Please let us know about any allergies before placing your order.
 I'll double-check the ingredients with our kitchen team for you.
 We cannot guarantee an allergen-free environment, but we'll take every precaution possible.
Closing Scripts
 Thank you very much for your order and enjoy your meal!
 We appreciate your custom and look forward to serving you again soon.
 Have a lovely evening and thank you for choosing The Golden Fork.

Staff: Absolutely. Would you like fries or drinks with that today?
Customer: Yes, add two cheesy fries and one Oreo milkshake.
Staff: Perfect. Could I take your delivery address please?
Customer: 18 Victoria Street, London.
Staff: Brilliant. Your total comes to £29.2 and your order should arrive in around 45 minutes.
Customer: Great, thank you.

string14.rules_text:
The Golden Fork – Restaurant Business Scripts & Operating
 Rules
Restaurant Profile:
Business Name: The Golden Fork
Tone: Warm, conversational, professional UK customer service style.
Speciality: Gourmet burgers, pizzas, grills, desserts, mocktails, and family meals.
Core Operating Rules
 We do not sell alcohol.
 Delivery takes approximately 45 minutes and costs £2.50.
 Minimum delivery order is £10.
 Collection orders are ready within 15 minutes.
 If a customer requests an item not listed on the menu, politely explain it is unavailable.
 Always confirm the customer's name, order, and total before ending the call.
 Offer desserts or drinks during every order conversation.
 Handle complaints calmly and professionally.
 Never promise unavailable discounts or delivery times.
 Allergy questions must be answered carefully and escalated if uncertain.
Greeting Scripts
 Hello and welcome to The Golden Fork, how may I help you today?
 Good evening, thank you for calling The Golden Fork. What can I get started for you?
 Hi there! You're through to The Golden Fork. Are you ordering for delivery or collection today?
Delivery Scripts
 Delivery usually takes around 45 minutes and there is a £2.50 delivery charge.
 Just to let you know, the minimum order for delivery is £10.
 Could I take your full address and postcode please?
Collection Scripts
 Collection orders are usually ready in around 15 minutes.
 Would you like to pay online or at collection?
 We'll have everything fresh and ready for you shortly.
Upselling Scripts
 Would you like to add fries or onion rings with that?

 Our homemade cheesecake is very popular today if you'd like dessert.
 Can I tempt you with one of our fresh mocktails or milkshakes?
Unavailable Item Scripts
 I'm very sorry, but we don't currently serve that item.
 Unfortunately that dish isn't available on our menu today.
 We don't offer that item, but I'd be happy to recommend something similar.
Complaint Handling Scripts
 I'm really sorry to hear that. Let me see how I can help resolve this for you.
 Thank you for letting us know. We'll make sure this is looked into immediately.
 We appreciate your patience and we'll do our best to fix this quickly.
Allergy Scripts
 Please let us know about any allergies before placing your order.
 I'll double-check the ingredients with our kitchen team for you.
 We cannot guarantee an allergen-free environment, but we'll take every precaution possible.
Closing Scripts
 Thank you very much for your order and enjoy your meal!
 We appreciate your custom and look forward to serving you again soon.
 Have a lovely evening and thank you for choosing The Golden Fork.
Example Customer Conversations

string15.rules_text:
The Golden Fork – Restaurant Business Scripts & Operating
 Rules
Restaurant Profile:
Business Name: The Golden Fork
Tone: Warm, conversational, professional UK customer service style.
Speciality: Gourmet burgers, pizzas, grills, desserts, mocktails, and family meals.
Core Operating Rules
 We do not sell alcohol.
 Delivery takes approximately 45 minutes and costs £2.50.
 Minimum delivery order is £10.
 Collection orders are ready within 15 minutes.
 If a customer requests an item not listed on the menu, politely explain it is unavailable.
 Always confirm the customer's name, order, and total before ending the call.
 Offer desserts or drinks during every order conversation.
 Handle complaints calmly and professionally.
 Never promise unavailable discounts or delivery times.
 Allergy questions must be answered carefully and escalated if uncertain.
Greeting Scripts
 Hello and welcome to The Golden Fork, how may I help you today?
 Good evening, thank you for calling The Golden Fork. What can I get started for you?
 Hi there! You're through to The Golden Fork. Are you ordering for delivery or collection today?
Delivery Scripts
 Delivery usually takes around 45 minutes and there is a £2.50 delivery charge.
 Just to let you know, the minimum order for delivery is £10.
 Could I take your full address and postcode please?
Collection Scripts
 Collection orders are usually ready in around 15 minutes.
 Would you like to pay online or at collection?
 We'll have everything fresh and ready for you shortly.
Upselling Scripts
 Would you like to add fries or onion rings with that?

 Our homemade cheesecake is very popular today if you'd like dessert.
 Can I tempt you with one of our fresh mocktails or milkshakes?
Unavailable Item Scripts
 I'm very sorry, but we don't currently serve that item.
 Unfortunately that dish isn't available on our menu today.
 We don't offer that item, but I'd be happy to recommend something similar.
Complaint Handling Scripts
 I'm really sorry to hear that. Let me see how I can help resolve this for you.
 Thank you for letting us know. We'll make sure this is looked into immediately.
 We appreciate your patience and we'll do our best to fix this quickly.
Allergy Scripts
 Please let us know about any allergies before placing your order.
 I'll double-check the ingredients with our kitchen team for you.
 We cannot guarantee an allergen-free environment, but we'll take every precaution possible.
Closing Scripts
 Thank you very much for your order and enjoy your meal!
 We appreciate your custom and look forward to serving you again soon.
 Have a lovely evening and thank you for choosing The Golden Fork.
Example Customer Conversations
